31126.title: M&A and Technological Expansion
31126.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Mario Leccese, Liad Wagman
31126.abstract: We examine how public firms listed in North American stock exchanges acquire technology companies during 2010-2020. Combining data from S&P, Refinitiv, Compustat, and CRSP, and utilizing a unique S&P taxonomy that classifies tech M&As by tech categories and business verticals, we show that 13.1% of public firms engage in any tech M&A in the S&P data, while only 6.75% of public firms make any (tech or non-tech) M&A in Refinitiv. In both datasets, the acquisitions are widespread across sectors of the economy, but tech acquirers in the S&P data are on average younger, more investment efficient, and more likely to engage in international acquisitions than general acquirers in Refinitiv. Within the S&P data, deals in each M&A-active tech category tend to be led by acquirers from a specific sector; the majority of target companies in tech M&As fall outside the acquirer’s core area of business; and firms are, in part, driven to acquire tech companies because they face increased competition in their core areas.
31126.zh_abstract: 我们考察了2010-2020年间在北美证券交易所上市的公众公司如何收购科技公司。结合来自S&P、Refinitiv、Compustat和CRSP的数据，并利用S&P独特的按技术类别和业务垂直领域对科技并购进行分类的分类法，我们显示13.1%的公众公司在S&P数据中参与了任何科技并购，而只有6.75%的公众公司在Refinitiv中进行了任何（科技或非科技）并购。在两个数据集中，收购广泛分布于经济各部门，但S&P数据中的科技收购方平均而言比Refinitiv中的一般收购方更年轻、投资效率更高，且更可能进行国际收购。在S&P数据内部，每个并购活跃的技术类别中的交易往往由来自特定行业的收购方主导；科技并购中的大多数目标公司属于收购方核心业务领域之外；企业收购科技公司的部分原因是其在核心领域面临日益激烈的竞争。

31125.title: Modeling Managers As EPS Maximizers
31125.zh_title: 将管理者建模为每股收益最大化者
31125.abstract: Textbook theory assumes that firm managers maximize the net present value of future cash flows. But when you ask them, the people running large public corporations say that they are maximizing something else entirely: earnings per share (EPS). Perhaps this is a mistake. No matter. We take managers at their word and show that EPS maximization provides a single unified explanation for a wide range of corporate policies such as leverage, share issuance and repurchases, M&A payment method, cash accumulation, and capital budgeting.
31125.zh_abstract: 教科书理论假设企业管理者最大化未来现金流的净现值。但当你询问他们时，大型上市公司的负责人表示他们正在最大化完全不同的东西：每股收益（EPS）。也许这是一个错误。没关系。我们相信管理者的话，并表明每股收益最大化为一系列广泛的公司政策提供了单一统一的解释，例如杠杆、股票发行与回购、并购支付方式、现金积累和资本预算。
31125.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G30, G31, G32, G34, G35

31124.title: Are Inflationary Shocks Regressive? A Feasible Set Approach
31124.zh_title: 通胀冲击是累退的吗？一个可行集方法
31124.authors: Felipe N. Del Canto, John R. Grigsby, Eric Qian, Conor Walsh
31124.abstract: We develop a framework to measure the welfare impact of inflationary shocks throughout the distribution. The first-order impact of a shock is summarized by the induced movements in agents' feasible sets: their budget constraint and borrowing constraints. To measure this impact, we combine estimated impulse response functions with micro-data on household consumption bundles, asset holdings and labor income for different US households. We find that inflationary oil shocks are regressive, but monetary expansions are progressive, and there is substantial heterogeneity throughout the life cycle. In both cases, the dominant channel is the effect of the shock on asset prices, not movements in goods prices or labor income.
31124.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个框架来衡量通胀冲击在整个分布中的福利影响。冲击的一阶影响由其在主体可行集（预算约束和借贷约束）中引发的变动来概括。为了衡量这种影响，我们将估计的脉冲响应函数与不同美国家庭的消费篮子、资产持有和劳动收入的微观数据相结合。我们发现通胀性石油冲击是累退的，但货币扩张是累进的，并且在整个生命周期中存在显著的异质性。在这两种情况下，主导渠道是冲击对资产价格的影响，而非商品价格或劳动收入的变动。

31123.title: Merger Effects and Antitrust Enforcement: Evidence from US Consumer Packaged Goods
31123.zh_title: 并购效应与反垄断执法：来自美国消费包装品的证据
31123.authors: Vivek Bhattacharya, Gastón Illanes, David Stillerman
31123.abstract: We document the effects of a comprehensive set of mergers of US consumer packaged goods manufacturers on prices, quantities, and product assortment. Across specifications, we find a small average price effect of mergers (-0.6% to 1.0%) but substantial heterogeneity in effects, with a standard deviation between 4.0–7.5 pp. Through a model of enforcement, we find that agencies act as if they challenge mergers they expect would increase prices more than 4.8–6.3%. Increases in stringency would reduce prices and the prevalence of completed price-increasing mergers, with minimal impacts on blocked price-decreasing mergers, at a significantly greater agency burden.
31123.zh_abstract: 我们记录了美国消费包装品制造商一系列全面并购对价格、数量和产品组合的影响。在各种设定下，我们发现并购的平均价格效应很小（-0.6%至1.0%），但效应存在显著异质性，标准差在4.0-7.5个百分点之间。通过一个执法模型，我们发现执法机构的行为似乎表明，它们会挑战那些预期会导致价格上涨超过4.8-6.3%的并购。提高执法严格程度将降低价格和已完成的价格上涨型并购的普遍性，同时对被阻止的价格下降型并购影响极小，但会显著增加机构负担。

31122.title: Large Language Models as Simulated Economic Agents: What Can We Learn from Homo Silicus?
31122.zh_title: 作为模拟经济主体的大型语言模型：我们能从Homo Silicus中学到什么？
31122.authors: John J. Horton, Apostolos Filippas, Benjamin S. Manning
31122.abstract: We argue that newly-developed large language models (LLMs), because of how they are trained and designed, are implicit computational models of humans—a Homo silicus. LLMs can be used like economists use Homo economicus: they can be given endowments, information, preferences, and so on, and then their behavior can be explored in scenarios via simulation. Experiments using this approach, derived from Charness and Rabin (2002), Kahneman et al. (1986), Samuelson and Zeckhauser (1988), Oprea (2024b), and Horton (2025), show qualitatively similar results to the original, and when they differ, it is often generative for future research. We discuss potential applications, conceptual issues, and why this approach can inform the study of humans.
31122.zh_abstract: 我们认为，新开发的大型语言模型（LLM），由于其训练和设计方式，是人类的隐式计算模型——一种Homo silicus。LLM可以像经济学家使用Homo economicus那样被使用：它们可以被赋予禀赋、信息、偏好等，然后通过模拟在各种场景中探索其行为。使用这种方法进行的实验，源自Charness和Rabin（2002）、Kahneman等人（1986）、Samuelson和Zeckhauser（1988）、Oprea（2024b）以及Horton（2025），显示出与原始研究定性相似的结果，而当结果不同时，这往往对未来研究具有生成性。我们讨论了潜在应用、概念问题以及为什么这种方法可以为人类研究提供信息。

31121.title: Asset Pricing with Optimal Under-Diversification
31121.zh_title: 最优分散不足下的资产定价
31121.abstract: We study sources and implications of undiversified portfolios in a production-based asset pricing model with financial frictions. Households take concentrated positions in a single firm exposed to idiosyncratic shocks because managerial effort requires equity stakes, and because investors gain private benefits from concentrated holdings. Matching data on returns and portfolios, we find that the marginal investor optimally holds 45% of their portfolio in a single firm, incentivizing managerial effort that accounts for 4% of aggregate output. Investors derive control benefits equivalent to 3% points of excess return, rationalizing low observed returns on undiversified holdings in the data. A counterfactual world of full diversification would feature higher risk free rates, lower risk premiums on fully diversified and concentrated assets, less capital accumulation, yet higher consumption and welfare. Exposure to undiversified firm risk can explain approximately 40% of the level and 20% of the volatility of the equity premium. A targeted subsidy that decreases diversification improves welfare by increasing managerial effort and reducing financial frictions.
31121.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有金融摩擦的生产型资产定价模型中研究了非分散化投资组合的来源和影响。由于管理层的努力需要股权激励，且投资者从集中持股中获得私人利益，家庭将集中投资于单一面临特质冲击的企业。通过匹配收益率和投资组合数据，我们发现边际投资者最优地将45%的投资组合持有于单一企业，这激励了管理层努力，其贡献约占总体产出的4%。投资者获得的控制权收益相当于3个百分点的超额收益，从而解释了数据中观察到的非分散化持股的低收益率。一个完全分散化的反事实世界将具有更高的无风险利率、更低的完全分散化和集中化资产的风险溢价、更少的资本积累，但更高的消费和福利。暴露于非分散化的企业风险可以解释约40%的股权溢价水平和20%的波动率。一项旨在降低分散化的定向补贴通过增加管理层努力和减少金融摩擦来改善福利。

31120.title: Skill Depreciation during Unemployment: Evidence from Panel Data
31120.zh_title: 失业期间的技能折旧：来自面板数据的证据
31120.authors: Jonathan P. Cohen, Andrew C. Johnston, Attila S. Lindner
31120.abstract: We use a panel of survey responses linked to administrative data in Germany to measure the depreciation of skills while workers are unemployed. Both the reemployment hazard rate and reemployment earnings steadily fall with unemployment duration, and indicators of depression and loneliness rise substantially. Despite this, we find no decline in a wide range of cognitive and noncognitive skills while workers remain unemployed. We find the same pattern in a panel of American workers. The results imply that skill depreciation in general human capital is unlikely to be a major explanation for duration dependence.
31120.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国与行政数据关联的调查响应面板数据，衡量工人失业期间的技能折旧。再就业风险率和再就业收入均随失业持续时间稳步下降，而抑郁和孤独感指标则显著上升。尽管如此，我们发现工人在失业期间，一系列认知和非认知技能并未出现下降。我们在美国工人面板数据中也发现了相同的模式。结果表明，通用人力资本的技能折旧不太可能是持续时间依赖性的主要解释因素。
31120.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：I32, J24, J6, J60, J64

31119.title: Equity Term Structures without Dividend Strips Data
31119.zh_title: 无股息剥离数据下的权益期限结构
31119.authors: Stefano Giglio, Bryan T. Kelly, Serhiy Kozak
31119.abstract: We use a large cross-section of equity returns to estimate a rich affine model of equity prices, dividends, returns and their dynamics. Using the model, we price dividend strips of the aggregate market index, as well as any other well-diversified equity portfolio. We do not use any dividend strips data in the estimation of the model; however, model-implied equity yields generated by the model match closely the equity yields from the traded dividend forwards reported in the literature. Our model can be used to extend the data on the term structure of aggregate (market) discount rates over time (back to the 1970s) and across maturities, since we are not limited by the maturities of actually traded dividend claims. Most importantly, the model generates term structures for any portfolio of stocks (e.g., small and value portfolios, high and low investment portfolios, etc). The novel cross-section of term structure data estimated by our model, covering a span of 45 years that includes several recessions, represents a rich set of new empirical moments that can be used to guide and evaluate asset pricing models, beyond the aggregate term structure of dividend strips that has been studied in the literature.
31119.zh_abstract: 我们利用大量横截面的股票收益率数据，估计了一个关于股票价格、股息、收益率及其动态的丰富仿射模型。利用该模型，我们为整体市场指数以及任何其他充分分散化的股票投资组合的股息剥离进行定价。在模型估计中，我们未使用任何股息剥离数据；然而，模型隐含的权益收益率与文献中报告的交易股息远期合约的权益收益率高度吻合。我们的模型可用于扩展整体（市场）贴现率期限结构的时间跨度（回溯至1970年代）和期限范围，因为我们不受实际交易股息索取权期限的限制。最重要的是，该模型能为任何股票投资组合（例如小盘股和价值股组合、高投资和低投资组合等）生成期限结构。我们的模型估计出的新颖横截面期限结构数据，覆盖了包含多次衰退的45年跨度，代表了丰富的新经验矩集合，可用于指导和评估资产定价模型，超越了文献中已研究的股息剥离整体期限结构。

31118.title: Derisking Real Estate in China’s Hybrid Economy
31118.zh_title: 中国混合经济中的房地产去风险化
31118.abstract: This article examines the risks faced by China's real estate sector within its distinct hybrid economy, which combines market mechanisms with comprehensive state planning and government intervention. The real estate sector holds particular importance as land sale revenues are a crucial source of funding for local governments, enabling them to finance infrastructure projects and stimulate economic growth. Banks are highly exposed to debt secured by real estate properties, not only involving real estate firms and households but also extending to local governments and affiliated companies. The hybrid structure gives the government a strong commitment and the ability to delay a real estate crisis. However, China’s real estate risk is ultimately tied to the country’s overall economic growth and remains susceptible to policy-related risks.
31118.zh_abstract: 本文考察了中国房地产行业在其独特的混合经济中所面临的风险，这种经济结合了市场机制与全面的国家规划和政府干预。房地产行业尤为重要，因为土地出让收入是地方政府的关键资金来源，使其能够为基础设施项目融资并刺激经济增长。银行对以房地产为抵押的债务敞口很高，不仅涉及房地产企业和家庭，还延伸至地方政府及其关联公司。这种混合结构赋予了政府推迟房地产危机的强烈承诺和能力。然而，中国的房地产风险最终与该国的整体经济增长挂钩，并且仍然容易受到政策相关风险的影响。
31118.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EFG, IFM；JEL：O18, O2, R0

31117.title: Dreaming of Leaving the Nest? Immigration Status and the Living Arrangements of DACAmented
31117.zh_title: 梦想离开巢穴？移民身份与DACA受益者的居住安排
31117.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Jakub Lonsky
31117.abstract: This study investigates the effects of the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) on the living arrangements and housing behavior of undocumented immigrants in the U.S. Using an event-study approach and difference-in-differences (DID) estimates, we compared immigrants above and below eligibility cutoffs and demonstrated that, after the adoption of the policy in June 2012, DACA-eligible immigrants were less likely to live with their parents or in multigenerational households (-12.5%) and more likely to live independently (+15.5%). We also revealed that DACA-eligible immigrants were less likely to live in the same house (-2%) and more likely to quit ethnic enclaves (+8%). Notably, these patterns are not explained by the known effects of DACA on income and employment outcomes. Lower rental costs (-3%) may have facilitated this transition into adulthood and the observed trends in living arrangements. The DACA also led to a decline in marriage rates among DACA-eligible individuals, although we found no evidence of significant effects on cohabitation, divorce, and intermarriage. We also found no evidence of a clear impact on fertility.
31117.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了童年入境暂缓遣返计划（DACA）对美国无证移民居住安排和住房行为的影响。采用事件研究法和双重差分估计，我们比较了资格门槛上下移民的情况，并证明在2012年6月该政策实施后，DACA合格移民与父母同住或生活在多代同堂家庭的可能性降低（-12.5%），而独立生活的可能性增加（+15.5%）。我们还发现，DACA合格移民居住在同一房屋的可能性降低（-2%），离开族裔聚居区的可能性增加（+8%）。值得注意的是，这些模式无法用DACA对收入和就业结果的已知影响来解释。较低的租金成本（-3%）可能促进了这种向成年的过渡以及观察到的居住安排趋势。DACA还导致DACA合格个体的结婚率下降，尽管我们没有发现对同居、离婚和通婚有显著影响的证据。我们也没有发现对生育率有明显影响的证据。

31116.title: On the Efficiency of Competitive Equilibria with Pandemics
31116.zh_title: 论存在流行病时竞争性均衡的效率
31116.authors: V. V. Chari, Rishabh Kirpalani, Luis Perez
31116.abstract: The epidemiological literature suggests that virus transmission occurs only when individuals are in relatively close contact. We show that if society can control the extent to which economic agents are exposed to the virus and agents can commit to contracts, virus externalities are local, and competitive equilibria are efficient. The Second Welfare Theorem also holds. These results still apply when infection status is imperfectly observed and when agents are privately informed about their infection status. If society cannot control virus exposure, then virus externalities are global and competitive equilibria are inefficient, but the policy implications are very different from those in the literature. Economic activity in this version of our model can be inefficiently low, in contrast to the conventional wisdom that viruses create global externalities and result in inefficiently high economic activity. If agents cannot commit, competitive equilibria are inefficient because of a novel pecuniary externality.
31116.zh_abstract: 流行病学文献表明，病毒传播仅发生在个体相对密切接触时。我们证明，如果社会能够控制经济主体暴露于病毒的程度，且主体能够承诺合约，那么病毒外部性是局部的，竞争性均衡是有效的。第二福利定理也成立。当感染状态被不完全观察以及主体私下知晓自身感染状态时，这些结果仍然适用。如果社会无法控制病毒暴露，那么病毒外部性是全局的，竞争性均衡是低效的，但政策含义与文献中的截然不同。在我们模型的这个版本中，经济活动可能低效地低，这与传统观点——病毒产生全局外部性并导致经济活动低效地高——形成对比。如果主体无法承诺，由于一种新颖的货币外部性，竞争性均衡是低效的。

31115.title: Is the Global Economy Deglobalizing? And if so, why? And what is next?
31115.zh_title: 全球经济正在去全球化吗？如果是，为什么？接下来会怎样？
31115.abstract: Data on global trade as well as capital and labor flows indicate a slowdown, but not reversal, of globalization post the 2008-09 financial crisis. Yet profound changes in the policy environment and public sentiment in the largest economies over the past five years suggest the beginning of a new era. Increasing anxiety about the labor market effects of import competition from low-wage countries, especially China, laid the groundwork, but was not the catalyst for the reversal in attitudes towards globalization. Similarly, the COVID pandemic provided novel arguments against free trade based on global supply chain resilience, but neither the pandemic nor short run policy response had enduring effects on trade flows. We demonstrate that global trade was remarkably resilient during the pandemic and that supply shortages would likely have been more severe in the absence of international trade. After a temporary decline in 2020, global trade in goods and services increased sharply in 2021. Russia’s invasion of Ukraine raised new concerns about national security and the exposure of supply chains to geopolitical risk. This was followed by demands to diversify away from “non-friendly” countries and to the employment of trade policy, export restrictions in particular, to halt China’s technological development. The future of globalization is highly uncertain at this point, but these new policies will likely slow global growth, innovation, and poverty reduction even if they benefit certain industries in certain countries. Regarding resilience, the main goal of recent trade policy changes, measures of trade volatility or concentration can be helpful, but resilience will be elusive as long as we lack benchmarks against which policy performance can be measured.
31115.zh_abstract: 全球贸易以及资本和劳动力流动的数据表明，在2008-09年金融危机后，全球化进程放缓但并未逆转。然而，过去五年中最大经济体的政策环境和公众情绪发生了深刻变化，预示着新时代的开始。对来自低工资国家（尤其是中国）进口竞争劳动力市场影响的日益焦虑奠定了基础，但并非全球化态度逆转的催化剂。同样，新冠疫情基于全球供应链韧性提供了反对自由贸易的新论点，但无论是疫情还是短期政策反应，都未对贸易流动产生持久影响。我们证明，全球贸易在疫情期间表现出显著的韧性，且若无国际贸易，供应短缺可能会更严重。在2020年暂时下降后，全球商品和服务贸易在2021年急剧增长。俄罗斯入侵乌克兰引发了对国家安全以及供应链暴露于地缘政治风险的新担忧。随后出现了要求从“非友好”国家多元化的呼声，并采用贸易政策（特别是出口限制）来遏制中国的技术发展。全球化的未来目前高度不确定，但这些新政策可能会减缓全球增长、创新和减贫，即使它们使某些国家的某些行业受益。关于韧性（近期贸易政策变化的主要目标），贸易波动性或集中度指标可能有所帮助，但只要我们缺乏衡量政策绩效的基准，韧性就难以实现。
31115.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, IFM, ITI；JEL：F0, F1, N0, O10, O49

31114.title: Four Facts About ESG Beliefs and Investor Portfolios
31114.zh_title: 关于ESG信念与投资者投资组合的四个事实
31114.authors: Stefano Giglio, Matteo Maggiori, Johannes Stroebel, Zhenhao Tan, Stephen Utkus, Xiao Xu
31114.abstract: We analyze survey data on ESG beliefs and preferences in a large panel of retail investors linked to administrative data on their investment portfolios. The survey elicits investors’ expectations of long-term ESG equity returns and asks about their motivations, if any, to invest in ESG assets. We document four facts. First, investors generally expected ESG investments to underperform the market. Between mid-2021 and late-2022, the average expected 10-year annualized return of ESG investments relative to the overall stock market was –1.4%. Second, there is substantial heterogeneity across investors in their ESG return expectations and their motives for ESG investing: 45% of survey respondents do not see any reason to invest in ESG, 25% are primarily motivated by ethical considerations, 22% are driven by climate hedging motives, and 7% are motivated by return expectations. Third, there is a link between individuals’ reported ESG investment motives and their actual investment behaviors, with the highest ESG portfolio holdings among individuals who report ethics-driven investment motives. Fourth, financial considerations matter independently of other investment motives: we find meaningful ESG holdings only for investors who expect these investments to outperform the market, even among those investors who reported that their most important ESG investment motives were ethical or hedging reasons.
31114.zh_abstract: 我们分析了与个人投资者投资组合行政数据相关联的大规模面板调查数据，内容涉及ESG信念和偏好。该调查询问投资者对长期ESG股票收益率的预期，并探究他们投资ESG资产的动机（如有）。我们记录了四个事实。第一，投资者普遍预期ESG投资表现逊于市场。在2021年中至2022年底期间，ESG投资相对于整体股票市场的平均预期10年年化收益率为-1.4%。第二，投资者在ESG收益率预期和ESG投资动机方面存在显著的异质性：45%的受访者认为没有理由投资ESG，25%主要受道德考量驱动，22%受气候对冲动机驱动，7%受收益率预期驱动。第三，个人报告的ESG投资动机与其实际投资行为之间存在关联，报告受道德驱动投资动机的个体持有最高的ESG投资组合。第四，财务考量独立于其他投资动机：我们发现，只有预期这些投资会跑赢市场的投资者才持有有意义的ESG头寸，即使在那些报告其最重要的ESG投资动机是道德或对冲原因的投资者中也是如此。
31114.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE；JEL：G4, G5, Q50, Q54

31113.title: Post COVID-19 Test Score Recovery: Initial Evidence from State Testing Data
31113.zh_title: 新冠疫情后考试成绩的恢复：来自州级测试数据的初步证据
31113.authors: Clare Halloran, Claire E. Hug, Rebecca Jack, Emily Oster
31113.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic caused significant disruption in schooling in the U.S., and student test scores showed dramatic declines by the end of the 2020-21 school year. We use state test score data to analyze patterns of test score recovery over the 2021-22 school year. On average, we find that 20% of test score losses are recovered in English language arts (ELA) by 2022, compared to 37% in math. These recovery rates do not significantly vary across demographic characteristics, baseline achievement rates, in-person schooling rates in the pandemic school year, or category-based measures of recovery funding allocations. We observe large state-level variation in recovery rates in ELA – from full recovery to further losses. This evidence suggests state-level factors play an important role in students' academic recovery, but we are unable to isolate particular state factors. Future work should focus on this variation to facilitate a broader recovery effort.
31113.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情对美国学校教育造成了严重干扰，到2020-21学年结束时，学生考试成绩出现大幅下降。我们利用州级考试成绩数据，分析了2021-22学年考试成绩的恢复模式。平均而言，我们发现到2022年，英语语言艺术（ELA）成绩损失恢复了20%，而数学成绩损失恢复了37%。这些恢复率在不同人口特征、基线成绩水平、疫情学年的线下教学率或基于类别的恢复资金分配指标之间没有显著差异。我们观察到各州在ELA恢复率上存在巨大差异——从完全恢复到进一步损失。这一证据表明，州级因素在学生学业恢复中发挥着重要作用，但我们无法分离出特定的州级因素。未来的研究应聚焦于这种差异，以促进更广泛的恢复努力。

31112.title: Policies, Projections, and the Social Cost of Carbon: Results from the DICE-2023 Model
31112.zh_title: 政策、预测与碳的社会成本：来自DICE-2023模型的结果
31112.abstract: The present study examines the assumptions, modeling structure, and preliminary results of DICE-2023, the revised Dynamic Integrated Model of Climate and the Economy (DICE), updated to 2023. The revision contains major changes in the carbon and climate modules, the treatment of non-industrial greenhouse gases, discount rates, as well as updates on all the major components. The major changes are a significantly lower level of temperature of the cost-benefit optimal policy, a lower cost of reaching the 2° C target, an analysis of the impact of the Paris Accord, and a major increase in the estimated social cost of carbon.
31112.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了DICE-2023（修订后的气候与经济动态综合模型，更新至2023年）的假设、建模结构和初步结果。此次修订包含碳和气候模块、非工业温室气体处理、贴现率以及所有主要组成部分的重大变化。主要变化包括：成本效益最优政策下的温度水平显著降低、实现2°C目标的成本降低、对《巴黎协定》影响的分析，以及碳的社会成本估算值大幅上升。

31111.title: Trade Shocks and Credit Reallocation
31111.zh_title: 贸易冲击与信贷重新配置
31111.authors: Stefano Federico, Fadi Hassan, Veronica Rappoport
31111.abstract: This paper identifies a credit-supply contraction that arises endogenously after trade liberalization. Banks with loan portfolios concentrated in sectors exposed to competition from China face an increase in non-performing loans after China’s entry into the World Trade Organization. As a result, they reduce the supply of credit to firms, irrespective of the firm’s sector of operation. This cut in credit translates into lower employment, investment, and output. Through this mechanism, the financial channel amplifies the shock to firms already hit by import competition from China and passes it on to firms in sectors expected to expand upon trade liberalization.
31111.zh_abstract: 本文识别出贸易自由化后内生的信贷供给收缩。贷款组合集中于受中国竞争影响行业的银行，在中国加入世界贸易组织后，不良贷款增加。因此，无论企业所在行业如何，这些银行都会减少对企业的信贷供给。这种信贷削减导致就业、投资和产出下降。通过这一机制，金融渠道放大了对已受中国进口竞争冲击的企业的影响，并将其传导至预期在贸易自由化后扩张的行业中的企业。

31110.title: The Short-Term Labor Supply Response to the Expanded Child Tax Credit
31110.zh_title: 扩大儿童税收抵免的短期劳动力供给反应
31110.authors: Brandon Enriquez, Damon Jones, Ernest V. Tedeschi
31110.abstract: We estimate the extensive and intensive margin labor supply response to the monthly Child Tax Credit disbursed in 2021 as a part of the American Rescue Plan Act. Using Current Population Survey microdata, we compare labor supply outcomes among households who qualify for varying relative increases in household income, as a result of their income level and household size. We do not find strong evidence of a change in labor supply for families receiving the credit. The results are robust to alternative labor supply models, where households respond mainly to cash on hand or changes in the annual budget set.
31110.zh_abstract: 我们估算了作为《美国救援计划法案》一部分于2021年发放的月度儿童税收抵免在广延边际和集约边际上的劳动力供给反应。利用当前人口调查微观数据，我们比较了因收入水平和家庭规模不同而获得不同相对收入增长的家庭之间的劳动力供给结果。我们没有发现强有力的证据表明领取该抵免的家庭劳动力供给发生变化。这一结果在替代劳动力供给模型下依然稳健，这些模型假设家庭主要对现金持有或年度预算集的变化做出反应。

31109.title: Nurse Practitioner Scope of Practice and Patient Harm: Evidence from Medical Malpractice Cases and Adverse Action Reports
31109.zh_title: 执业护士执业范围与患者伤害：来自医疗事故案件和不良行为报告的证据
31109.abstract: Many states have recently changed their scope of practice laws and granted full practice authority to nurse practitioners, allowing them to practice without oversight from physicians. Physician groups have argued against this change, citing patient safety concerns. In this paper, we use a ratio-in-ratio approach to evaluate whether the transition to full practice authority results in harm to patients as proxied by rates of malpractice payouts and adverse action reports against nurse practitioners. We find no evidence of such harm, and instead find that physicians may benefit from the law change in terms of reduced malpractice payouts against them.
31109.zh_abstract: 许多州最近修改了执业范围法律，授予执业护士完全执业权，允许他们在没有医生监督的情况下执业。医生团体以患者安全为由反对这一变化。在本文中，我们采用比率-比率方法评估向完全执业权过渡是否会导致患者伤害，以针对执业护士的医疗事故赔付率和不良行为报告率作为代理指标。我们没有发现此类伤害的证据，反而发现医生可能从法律变化中受益，表现为针对他们的医疗事故赔付减少。

31108.title: Natural Capital Considerations for an Extension of the U.S. Marine Economy Satellite Account
31108.zh_title: 美国海洋经济卫星账户扩展的自然资本考量
31108.authors: Jeffrey Wielgus, Monica Grasso, Charles Colgan, Jennifer Zhuang, Sarah C. Siegel, Joseph Conran, Tadesse Wodajo
31108.abstract: In an effort to measure and track marine-dependent economic activities, the United States National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) has developed two statistical tools: The Economics: National Ocean Watch (ENOW) and the Marine Economy Satellite Account (MESA). In both efforts, the focus has been on certain activities in selected sectors of the economy. MESA is developed within the framework of the System of National Accounts (SNA) and includes only economic activities that use essential marine inputs, produce goods or services to be used predominantly in the marine environment, take place in the marine environment, or need to be placed in proximity to the coast to take place. In addition, MESA only employs data on the annual flows of market-based values related to the marine activities. As an SNA-based tool, MESA also fails to systematically keep track of the contribution of the environment to the economy by properly accounting for the changes (both additions and reductions) in the environmental capital stock values. \nThis paper proposes an initial extension of MESA to include natural capital considerations by employing key elements of the System of Environmental-Economic Accounts Central Framework (SEEA-CF) adopted as the initial international statistical standard for environmental-economic accounting by the United Nations Statistical Commission in 2012. In addition to reporting the economic activities captured by the SNA structure, the SEEA-CF requires measuring both additions to the environmental capital stocks (due to natural growth or improved resource management) and reductions in these stocks (resulting from depletion from use in the production process or removal of resources from the natural stock). Considering the complexity involved in the measurement of the natural capital foundations of the ocean-related economy, the paper proposes to launch the MESA extension as a pilot project focusing only on selected data rich marine activities defined in MESA, namely, offshore oil and gas, commercial fishing, and beach recreation.
31108.zh_abstract: 为衡量和追踪海洋依赖型经济活动，美国国家海洋和大气管理局（NOAA）开发了两种统计工具：经济学：国家海洋观察（ENOW）和海洋经济卫星账户（MESA）。在这两项工作中，重点都放在选定经济部门的某些活动上。MESA是在国民账户体系（SNA）框架内开发的，仅包括使用关键海洋投入、生产主要供海洋环境使用的商品或服务、发生在海洋环境中或需要靠近海岸才能进行的经济活动。此外，MESA仅使用与海洋活动相关的市场价值年度流量数据。作为基于SNA的工具，MESA也未能通过适当核算环境资本存量价值的变化（包括增加和减少）来系统追踪环境对经济的贡献。
31108.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：Q0, Q20, Q3, Q32, Q5, Q56, Q57

31107.title: Business Group Spillovers
31107.abstract: We compare the investment of standalone firms across regions after a positive shock to the investment opportunities generated by a large-scale highway development project. We show that the standalones’ investment sensitivity is lower in regions with a higher density of business groups in the local area. We investigate mechanisms driving our results and find support for a financing mechanism whereby banks allocate capital preferentially to group-affiliated firms in responding to the increase in credit demand. Overall, our study documents that business groups have spillover effects on standalone firms.
31107.zh_abstract: 我们比较了在大型公路开发项目带来的投资机会正向冲击下，各地区独立企业的投资情况。我们发现，在当地商业集团密度较高的地区，独立企业的投资敏感性较低。我们研究了驱动我们结果的机制，并找到了融资机制的支持证据，即银行在应对信贷需求增加时，优先将资本分配给集团关联企业。总体而言，我们的研究表明商业集团对独立企业具有溢出效应。

31106.title: Do Entrepreneurs Want Control? And Should They Get What They Want? A Historical and Theoretical Exploration
31106.zh_title: 企业家想要控制权吗？他们应该得到他们想要的吗？历史与理论探索
31106.abstract: From Elihu Thomson and Herbert Dow in the late nineteenth century to Steve Jobs a hundred years later, many entrepreneurs have been stymied by their investors. In this paper, we use a simple model to explore how outcomes might have been different if entrepreneurs, instead of the investors, had control of their firms. We also explore the importance of legal rules that enable entrepreneurs to lock in control even when, under one-share-one-vote governance, power would rest with their investors. We find that entrepreneurs take advantage of such rules when the cost of capital is low, as in Britain in the early twentieth century or the US in the early twenty-first century. We also find that firms controlled by entrepreneurs can take on more difficult projects, and thus push the technological frontier out more rapidly, than firms controlled by investors. Such firms are also superior in this way to serial startups.
31106.zh_abstract: 从19世纪末的伊莱休·汤姆森和赫伯特·道，到一百年后的史蒂夫·乔布斯，许多企业家都受到投资者的阻挠。在本文中，我们使用一个简单模型探讨如果企业家而非投资者控制其公司，结果可能会如何不同。我们还探讨了法律规则的重要性，这些规则使企业家能够锁定控制权，即使在一股一票的治理结构下权力本应归于投资者。我们发现，当资本成本较低时，如20世纪初的英国或21世纪初的美国，企业家会利用此类规则。我们还发现，与投资者控制的公司相比，企业家控制的公司可以承担更困难的项目，从而更快地推动技术前沿。这类公司在这方面也优于连续创业公司。
31106.meta: Programs：DAE, PR；JEL：G3, K2, N2, N8, O39

31105.title: China as an International Lender of Last Resort
31105.zh_title: 中国作为国际最后贷款人
31105.authors: Sebastian Horn, Bradley C. Parks, Carmen M. Reinhart, Christoph Trebesch
31105.abstract: This paper shows that China has launched a new global system for cross-border rescue lending to countries in debt distress. We build the first comprehensive dataset on China’s overseas bailouts between 2000 and 2021 and provide new insights into China’s growing role in the global financial system. A key finding is that the global swap line network put in place by the People’s Bank of China is increasingly used as a financial rescue mechanism, with more than USD 170 billion in liquidity support extended to crisis countries, including repeated rollovers of swaps coming due. The swaps bolster gross reserves and are mostly drawn by distressed countries with low liquidity ratios. In addition, we show that Chinese state-owned banks and enterprises have given out an additional USD 70 billion in rescue loans for balance of payments support. Taken together, China’s overseas bailouts correspond to more than 20 percent of total IMF lending over the past decade and bailout amounts are growing fast. However, China’s rescue loans differ from those of established international lenders of last resort in that they (i) are opaque, (ii) carry relatively high interest rates, and (iii) are almost exclusively targeted to debtors of China's Belt and Road Initiative. These findings have implications for the international financial and monetary architecture, which is becoming more multipolar, less institutionalized, and less transparent.
31105.zh_abstract: 本文表明，中国已建立了一个新的全球跨境救助贷款体系，用于向陷入债务困境的国家提供援助。我们构建了2000年至2021年间中国海外救助的首个综合数据集，并提供了关于中国在全球金融体系中日益增长作用的新见解。一个关键发现是，中国人民银行建立的全球货币互换网络正越来越多地被用作金融救助机制，已向危机国家提供了超过1700亿美元的流动性支持，包括对到期互换协议的多次展期。这些互换增强了总储备，且主要由流动性比率较低的困境国家提取。此外，我们显示，中国国有银行和国有企业还额外提供了700亿美元的救助贷款用于国际收支支持。总体而言，中国海外救助规模相当于过去十年国际货币基金组织总贷款额的20%以上，且救助金额增长迅速。然而，中国的救助贷款与成熟的国际最后贷款人提供的贷款存在差异，具体表现为：(i) 不透明，(ii) 利率相对较高，以及(iii) 几乎完全针对中国“一带一路”倡议的债务国。这些发现对国际金融和货币体系具有启示意义，该体系正变得更加多极化、更少制度化且更不透明。
31105.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：F2, F33, F42, F65, G15, H63, N25

31104.title: Five Myths About Carbon Pricing
31104.zh_title: 关于碳定价的五个迷思
31104.abstract: While carbon pricing, in general, and carbon taxes, in particular, are popular with economists, they are subject to considerable misunderstanding among policy makers and the public. In this paper I consider and refute five myths about carbon taxes: 1) that a carbon price will hurt economic growth; 2) that carbon pricing will kill jobs; 3) that a carbon tax and cap and trade program have the same economic impacts; 4) that we can’t achieve carbon reduction targets with a carbon tax; and 5) that carbon pricing is regressive. I then discuss implications for policy making.
31104.zh_abstract: 尽管碳定价（尤其是碳税）受到经济学家的欢迎，但政策制定者和公众对其存在相当大的误解。在本文中，我考虑并驳斥了关于碳税的五个迷思：1) 碳价格会损害经济增长；2) 碳定价会扼杀就业；3) 碳税与总量控制与交易计划具有相同的经济影响；4) 我们无法通过碳税实现碳减排目标；以及5) 碳定价是累退的。随后，我讨论了这些结论对政策制定的启示。

31103.title: Solving Heterogeneous Agent Models with the Master Equation
31103.zh_title: 用主方程求解异质性主体模型
31103.abstract: This paper proposes an analytic representation of perturbations in heterogeneous agent economies with aggregate shocks up to any order. Treating the underlying distribution as an explicit state variable, the value function defined on an infinite-dimensional state space summarizes the entire economy and satisfies the ‘Master Equation’ introduced in the mathematics mean field games literature. I show that analytic perturbations of the Master Equation deliver dramatic simplifications. The First-order Approximation to the Master Equation (FAME) reduces to a standard Bellman equation for the directional derivatives of the value function with respect to the distribution and aggregate shocks. The FAME has six main advantages: (i) finite dimension; (ii) closed-form mapping to steady-state objects; (iii) applicability when many distributional moments or prices enter individuals' decision such as dynamic trade, urban or job ladder settings; (iv) block-recursivity bypassing further fixed points; (v) characterization of stability and of the stochastic steady-state; (vi) fast implementation using standard numerical methods. I develop the Second-order Approximation to the Master Equation (SAME) and show that it shares these properties, making it suitable to handle nonlinearities, aggregate risk, and asset pricing. I illustrate the FAME and the SAME with two applications. First, I show that the cost of business cycles is several orders of magnitude larger in incomplete market models. Second, I show that dynamic spatial migration models display near linearity at conventional aggregate shocks.
31103.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个在存在总体冲击的异质性主体经济中，任意阶扰动的解析表示。将潜在分布视为显式状态变量，定义在无限维状态空间上的价值函数概括了整个经济，并满足数学平均场博弈文献中引入的“主方程”。我表明，主方程的解析扰动带来了显著的简化。主方程的一阶近似（FAME）简化为关于价值函数对分布和总体冲击的方向导数的标准贝尔曼方程。FAME有六个主要优势：(i) 有限维；(ii) 与稳态对象的封闭形式映射；(iii) 适用于许多分布矩或价格进入个体决策的情形，如动态贸易、城市或职业阶梯设定；(iv) 块递归性，绕过了进一步的固定点；(v) 稳定性与随机稳态的表征；(vi) 使用标准数值方法快速实现。我发展了主方程的二阶近似（SAME），并表明其共享这些性质，使其适用于处理非线性、总体风险和资产定价。我通过两个应用说明了FAME和SAME。首先，我表明在不完全市场模型中，经济周期的成本要大几个数量级。其次，我表明动态空间迁移模型在常规总体冲击下表现出近乎线性。

31102.title: Evolution of Risk Aversion over Five Years after a Major Natural Disaster
31102.zh_title: 重大自然灾害后五年内风险厌恶的演变
31102.authors: Nicholas Ingwersen, Elizabeth Frankenberg, Duncan Thomas
31102.abstract: The impact of exposure to a major unanticipated natural disaster on the evolution of survivors’ attitudes toward risk is examined, exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in exposure to the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami in combination with rich population-representative longitudinal survey data spanning the five years after the tsunami. Respondents chose among pairs of hypothetical income streams. Those directly exposed to the tsunami made choices consistent with greater willingness to take on risk relative to those not directly exposed to the tsunami. These differences are short-lived: starting a year later, there is no evidence of differences in willingness to take on risk between the two groups. These conclusions hold for tsunami-related exposures measured at the individual and community level. Apparently, tsunami survivors were inclined to assume greater financial risk in the short-term while rebuilding their lives after the disaster.
31102.zh_abstract: 本文考察了经历一场重大意外自然灾害对幸存者风险态度演变的冲击，利用2004年印度洋海啸暴露程度的似外生变化，结合海啸后五年内具有人口代表性的纵向调查数据。受访者在成对的假设收入流之间进行选择。那些直接暴露于海啸的受访者，其选择表明相对于未直接暴露者更愿意承担风险。这些差异是短暂的：从一年后开始，两组之间在承担风险意愿上没有发现差异的证据。这些结论适用于在个人和社区层面测量的海啸相关暴露。显然，海啸幸存者在灾后重建生活期间，短期内倾向于承担更大的财务风险。

31101.title: The Macroeconomics of Intensive Agriculture
31101.zh_title: 集约农业的宏观经济学
31101.authors: Timo Boppart, Patrick Kiernan, Per Krusell, Hannes Malmberg
31101.abstract: Developing countries employ a very large share of their workforce in agriculture, a sector in which their labor productivity is particularly low. We take a macroeconomic approach to analyze the role of agriculture in development. We construct a new database with systematic measures of inputs and outputs of agricultural production around the globe. The data exhibits strong neoclassical features: going from poor to rich countries, capital and intermediate input prices decline dramatically relative to labor prices; concurrently, capital and intermediate input use in agriculture increases by a factor of 300–800 relative to labor. Input intensification accounts for a bit less than two thirds of the agricultural labor productivity gap between the poorest and richest countries. Our observations are well explained by an aggregate agricultural production function with input substitutabilities significantly above unity. On the demand side, standard non-homothetic preferences accurately capture how the expenditure share of agricultural goods varies across the development spectrum. We incorporate our findings into a closed-economy general-equilibrium model with minimal distortions, showing that non-agricultural TFP differences play a much more important role than agricultural TFP differences in explaining income differences.
31101.zh_abstract: 发展中国家将其劳动力的很大一部分投入农业，而该部门的劳动生产率尤其低下。我们采用宏观经济学方法分析农业在经济发展中的作用。我们构建了一个新的数据库，系统衡量全球农业生产的投入和产出。数据表现出强烈的新古典特征：从穷国到富国，资本和中间投入品价格相对于劳动力价格大幅下降；同时，农业中资本和中间投入品的使用量相对于劳动力增加了300-800倍。投入集约化解释了最贫穷和最富裕国家之间农业劳动生产率差距的近三分之二。我们的观察结果可以通过一个投入替代弹性显著高于1的加总农业生产函数得到很好的解释。在需求侧，标准的非位似偏好准确地捕捉了农产品支出份额在整个发展谱系中的变化。我们将这些发现纳入一个具有最小扭曲的封闭经济一般均衡模型，表明非农业全要素生产率差异在解释收入差异方面比农业全要素生产率差异重要得多。

31100.title: No Ground Truth? No Problem: Improving Administrative Data Linking Using Active Learning and a Little Bit of Guile
31100.zh_title: 没有真实数据？没问题：利用主动学习和一点巧思改进行政数据链接
31100.authors: Sarah Tahamont, Zubin Jelveh, Melissa McNeill, Shi Yan, Aaron Chalfin, Benjamin Hansen
31100.abstract: While linking records across large administrative datasets [“big data”] has the potential to revolutionize empirical social science research, many administrative data files do not have common identifiers and are thus not designed to be linked to others. To address this problem, researchers have developed probabilistic record linkage algorithms which use statistical patterns in identifying characteristics to perform linking tasks. Naturally, the accuracy of a candidate linking algorithm can be substantially improved when an algorithm has access to “ground-truth” examples — matches which can be validated using institutional knowledge or auxiliary data. Unfortunately, the cost of obtaining these examples is typically high, often requiring a researcher to manually review pairs of records in order to make an informed judgement about whether they are a match. When a pool of ground-truth information is unavailable, researchers can use “active learning” algorithms for linking, which ask the user to provide ground-truth information for select candidate pairs. In this paper, we investigate the value of providing ground-truth examples via active learning for linking performance. We confirm popular intuition that data linking can be dramatically improved with the availability of ground truth examples. But critically, in many real-world applications, only a relatively small number of tactically-selected ground-truth examples are needed to obtain most of the achievable gains. With a modest investment in ground truth, researchers can approximate the performance of a supervised learning algorithm that has access to a large database of ground truth examples using a readily available off-the-shelf tool.
31100.zh_abstract: 尽管跨大型行政数据集（“大数据”）链接记录有可能彻底改变实证社会科学研究，但许多行政数据文件没有通用标识符，因此并非设计用于相互链接。为解决此问题，研究人员开发了概率记录链接算法，利用识别特征中的统计模式来执行链接任务。自然，当算法能够访问“真实”示例（即可通过机构知识或辅助数据验证的匹配）时，候选链接算法的准确性可以得到显著提高。不幸的是，获取这些示例的成本通常很高，通常需要研究人员手动审查记录对，以便就它们是否匹配做出明智判断。当缺乏真实信息池时，研究人员可以使用“主动学习”算法进行链接，该算法要求用户为选定的候选对提供真实信息。在本文中，我们研究了通过主动学习提供真实示例对链接性能的价值。我们证实了普遍直觉，即数据链接可以通过真实示例的可用性得到显著改善。但关键的是，在许多实际应用中，只需要相对较少数量的策略性选择的真实示例，就能获得大部分可实现的收益。通过适度的真实信息投入，研究人员可以使用现成的工具，近似于能够访问大型真实示例数据库的监督学习算法的性能。

31152.title: Judging Nudging: Understanding the Welfare Effects of Nudges Versus Taxes
31152.zh_title: 评判助推：理解助推与税收的福利效应
31152.authors: John A. List, Matthias Rodemeier, Sutanuka Roy, Gregory K. Sun
31152.abstract: While behavioral non-price interventions (“nudges”) have grown from academic curiosity to a bona fide policy tool, their relative economic efficiency remains under-researched. We develop a unified framework to estimate welfare effects of both nudges and taxes, while allowing for normative ambiguity about how nudges map into utility. We showcase our approach by creating a database of more than 300 carefully hand-coded point estimates of non-price and price interventions in the markets for cigarettes, influenza vaccinations, and household energy. While nudges are effective in changing behavior in all three markets, they are not necessarily the most efficient policy. When nudges are debiasing, they are more efficient in the market for cigarettes, while taxes are more efficient in the vaccine and energy market. Interestingly, these conclusions also often hold when nudges are deceptive rather than debiasing. We identify two key factors that govern the difference in results across markets: i) an elasticity-weighted standard deviation of the behavioral bias, and ii) the magnitude of the average externality. Nudges dominate taxes whenever i) exceeds ii). Finally, we consider cases in which nudges cause direct psychic costs or benefits to consumers.
31152.zh_abstract: 尽管行为非价格干预（“助推”）已从学术好奇心发展为真正的政策工具，但其相对经济效率仍研究不足。我们开发了一个统一框架来估计助推和税收的福利效应，同时允许在助推如何映射到效用方面存在规范上的模糊性。我们通过创建一个包含300多个精心手工编码的香烟、流感疫苗接种和家庭能源市场中非价格和价格干预点估计的数据库来展示我们的方法。虽然助推在这三个市场中都能有效改变行为，但它们未必是最有效的政策。当助推是去偏时，它们在香烟市场中更有效率，而税收在疫苗和能源市场中更有效率。有趣的是，即使助推具有欺骗性而非去偏性，这些结论也常常成立。我们确定了导致不同市场结果差异的两个关键因素：i) 行为偏差的弹性加权标准差，以及 ii) 平均外部性的规模。当 i) 超过 ii) 时，助推优于税收。最后，我们考虑了助推给消费者带来直接心理成本或收益的情况。

31151.title: Has China’s Growth Gone From Miracle to Malady?
31151.zh_title: 中国的增长是从奇迹走向病态了吗？
31151.abstract: China’s remarkable run of persistently high growth in recent decades is all the more stunning in light of the country’s low levels of financial and institutional development, state-dominated economy, and nondemocratic government. Notwithstanding the inefficient and risky growth model, the government has maneuvered the economy around various stresses without any major financial or economic crash. With a shrinking labor force and declining efficiency of investment, raising productivity growth is key to maintaining reasonable GDP growth. Unbalanced reforms, a schizophrenic approach to the role of the market versus the state, and strains in financial and property markets could result in significant volatility but a financial or economic collapse is not in the cards.
31151.zh_abstract: 中国近几十年来持续高增长的非凡表现，鉴于其金融和制度发展水平低、国家主导的经济以及非民主政府，显得尤为惊人。尽管存在低效且高风险的增長模式，政府仍成功驾驭经济应对各种压力，而未发生重大金融或经济崩溃。随着劳动力萎缩和投资效率下降，提高生产率增长对于维持合理的GDP增长至关重要。不平衡的改革、对市场与政府角色矛盾的看法，以及金融和房地产市场的压力，可能导致显著波动，但金融或经济崩溃的可能性不大。

31150.title: AGING IN STYLE: Seniority and Sentiment in Scholarly Writing
31150.zh_title: 优雅地老去：学术写作中的资历与情感
31150.abstract: The scholarly impact of academic research matters for academic promotions, influence, relevance to public policy, and others. Focusing on writing style in top-level professional journals, we examine how it changes with age, and how stylistic differences and age affect impact. As top-level scholars age, their writing style increasingly differs from others’. The impact (measured by citations) of each contribution decreases, due to the direct effect of age and the much smaller indirect effects through style. Non-native English-speakers write in different styles from others, in ways that reduce the impact of their research. Nobel laureates’ scholarly writing evinces less certainty about the conclusions of their research than that of other highly productive scholars.
31150.zh_abstract: 学术研究的学术影响力对学术晋升、影响力、与公共政策的相关性等方面至关重要。我们聚焦于顶级专业期刊的写作风格，考察其如何随年龄变化，以及风格差异和年龄如何影响影响力。随着顶级学者年龄增长，他们的写作风格越来越与众不同。每项贡献的影响力（以引用量衡量）会下降，这是由于年龄的直接效应以及通过风格产生的更小的间接效应。非英语母语者的写作风格与他人不同，这种差异降低了其研究的影响力。诺贝尔奖得主的学术写作对其研究结论表现出的确定性低于其他高产学者。

31149.title: An Anatomy of Monopsony: Search Frictions, Amenities and Bargaining in Concentrated Markets
31149.zh_title: 买方垄断剖析：集中市场中的搜索摩擦、非工资福利与议价
31149.authors: David W. Berger, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Andreas R. Kostøl, Simon Mongey
31149.abstract: We contribute a theory in which three channels interact to determine the degree of monopsony power and therefore the wedge between a worker’s spot wage and her marginal product (henceforth, the wage markdown): (1) heterogeneity in worker-firm-specific preferences (nonwage amenities), (2) firm granularity, and (3) off- and on-the-job search frictions. We use Norwegian data to discipline each channel and then reproduce novel reduced-form empirical relationships between market concentration, job flows, wages and wage inequality. Our main exercise quantifies the contribution of each channel to income inequality and wage markdowns. The markdowns are 21 percent in our baseline estimation. Removing nonwage amenity dispersion narrows them by a third. Giving the next-lowest-ranked competitor a seat at the bargaining table narrows them by half. Removing search frictions narrows them by two-thirds. Each counterfactual shows decreased wage inequality and increased welfare.
31149.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个理论，其中三个渠道相互作用决定买方垄断势力的程度，从而决定工人即期工资与其边际产品之间的楔子（以下简称工资折价）：(1) 工人-企业特定偏好的异质性（非工资福利），(2) 企业粒度，以及 (3) 在职和离职搜索摩擦。我们使用挪威数据来约束每个渠道，然后重现市场集中度、工作流动、工资与工资不平等之间新颖的简约式实证关系。我们的主要练习量化了每个渠道对收入不平等和工资折价的贡献。在我们的基准估计中，工资折价为21%。消除非工资福利离散度使其缩小三分之一。让排名次低的竞争对手参与谈判使其缩小一半。消除搜索摩擦使其缩小三分之二。每个反事实情景都显示工资不平等减少和福利增加。

31148.title: Should History Change The Way We Think About Populism?
31148.zh_title: 历史是否应改变我们对民粹主义的看法？
31148.authors: Alan de Bromhead, Kevin Hjortshøj O'Rourke
31148.abstract: This paper asks whether history should change the way in which economists and economic historians think about populism. We use Müller’s definition, according to which populism is ‘an exclusionary form of identity politics, which is why it poses a threat to democracy’. We make three historical arguments. First, late 19th century US Populists were not populist. Second, there is no necessary relationship between populism and anti-globalization sentiment. Third, economists have sometimes been on the wrong side of important policy debates involving opponents rightly or wrongly described as populist. History encourages us to avoid an overly simplistic view of populism and its correlates.
31148.zh_abstract: 本文探讨历史是否应改变经济学家和经济史学家对民粹主义的看法。我们采用穆勒的定义，即民粹主义是“一种排他性的身份政治形式，因此对民主构成威胁”。我们提出三个历史论点。首先，19世纪末的美国民粹主义者并非民粹主义者。其次，民粹主义与反全球化情绪之间没有必然联系。第三，经济学家有时在涉及被正确或错误描述为民粹主义反对者的重要政策辩论中站错了立场。历史鼓励我们避免对民粹主义及其相关因素持有过于简单化的观点。

31147.title: Merger Guidelines for the Labor Market
31147.zh_title: 劳动力市场的并购指南
31147.authors: David W. Berger, Thomas Hasenzagl, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Simon Mongey, Eric A. Posner
31147.abstract: While the labor market implications of mergers have historically been ignored, recent actions by the Department of Justice (DOJ) place buyer market power (i.e., monopsony) at the forefront of antitrust policy. We develop a theory of multi-plant ownership and monopsony to help guide this new policy focus. We estimate the model using U.S. Census data and demonstrate the model’s ability to replicate empirically documented paths of employment and wages following mergers. We then simulate a representative set of U.S. mergers in order to evaluate merger review thresholds. Our main exercise applies the DOJ and FTC’s product market concentration thresholds to local labor markets. Assuming mergers generate efficiency gains of 5 percent, our simulations suggest that workers are harmed, on average, under the enforcement of the more lenient 2010 merger guidelines and unharmed, on average, under enforcement of the more stringent 1982 merger guidelines. We also provide a framework for further research evaluating alternative concentration thresholds based on assumptions about the efficiency effects of mergers and the resource constraints of regulators. Finally, we provide guidance for using the Gross Downward Wage Pressure method for evaluating the impact of mergers on labor markets.
31147.zh_abstract: 尽管并购对劳动力市场的影响历来被忽视，但司法部近期的行动将买方市场势力（即买方垄断）置于反垄断政策的前沿。我们发展了一个多工厂所有权与买方垄断的理论，以指导这一新的政策重点。我们使用美国人口普查数据估计该模型，并展示模型复制并购后就业和工资的实证记录路径的能力。然后，我们模拟一组具有代表性的美国并购，以评估并购审查阈值。我们的主要练习将司法部和联邦贸易委员会的产品市场集中度阈值应用于本地劳动力市场。假设并购产生5%的效率收益，我们的模拟表明，在更宽松的2010年并购指南执行下，工人平均受到损害；而在更严格的1982年并购指南执行下，工人平均未受损害。我们还提供了一个框架，用于基于对并购效率效应和监管者资源约束的假设，评估替代集中度阈值的进一步研究。最后，我们为使用总向下工资压力方法评估并购对劳动力市场的影响提供指导。
31147.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D40, E20, H0, J0, K0, L0

31146.title: Empirical Analyses of Selection and Welfare in Insurance Markets: A Self-Indulgent Survey
31146.zh_title: 保险市场中逆向选择与福利的实证分析：一篇自我放纵的综述
31146.abstract: This review article, which was solicited by the Geneva Risk and Insurance Review, surveys work that has been done using an empirical framework for analyzing selection in insurance markets developed by Einav, Finkelstein, and Cullen (2010). We briefly review that framework, and then describe a number of empirical applications that researchers have undertaken across an array of settings in both insurance and credit markets. We also discuss some of the useful extensions to the original framework that others have made and applied. The review is intended to be useful for scholars who may want to apply the framework in their own work on insurance, credit, or other selection markets.
31146.zh_abstract: 这篇综述文章应《日内瓦风险与保险评论》之邀撰写，评述了使用Einav、Finkelstein和Cullen（2010）开发的实证框架分析保险市场逆向选择的研究工作。我们简要回顾该框架，然后描述研究人员在保险和信贷市场的各种环境中进行的一系列实证应用。我们还讨论了其他人对该原始框架所做的一些有用扩展及其应用。这篇综述旨在为那些可能希望在自己的保险、信贷或其他选择市场研究中应用该框架的学者提供帮助。
31146.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EH, IO, PE；JEL：D60, D82

31145.title: The Importance of Financial Literacy: Opening a New Field
31145.zh_title: 金融素养的重要性：开辟一个新领域
31145.abstract: We undertake an assessment of our two decades of research on financial literacy, building on our empirical research and theoretical work casting financial knowledge as a form of investment in human capital. We also draw on recent data to determine who is the most – and least – financially savvy in the United States, and we highlight the similarity of our results in other countries. A number of convincing studies is now available, from which we draw conclusions about the effects and consequences of financial illiteracy, and what can be done to fill these gaps. We conclude by offering our thoughts on implications for teaching, financial literacy programs, and future research.
31145.zh_abstract: 我们基于实证研究和理论工作，将金融知识视为一种人力资本投资形式，对二十年来关于金融素养的研究进行了评估。我们还利用最新数据来确定美国哪些人最精通金融、哪些人最不精通，并强调了我们在其他国家得出的结果具有相似性。目前已有大量令人信服的研究，我们从中得出结论，探讨金融素养不足的影响和后果，以及可以采取哪些措施来填补这些空白。最后，我们就这些发现对教学、金融素养项目以及未来研究的启示提出了我们的思考。

31144.title: Women's Colleges and Economics Major Choice: Evidence from Wellesley College Applicants
31144.zh_title: 女子学院与经济学专业选择：来自韦尔斯利学院申请者的证据
31144.authors: Kristin F. Butcher, Patrick McEwan, Akila Weerapana
31144.abstract: Many observers argue that diversity in Economics and STEM fields is critical, not simply because of egalitarian goals, but because who is in a field may shape what is studied by it. If increasing the rate of majoring in mathematically-intensive fields among women is a worthy goal, then understanding whether women’s colleges causally affect that choice is important. Among all admitted applicants to Wellesley College, enrollees are 7.2 percentage points (94%) more likely to receive an Economics degree than non-enrollees (a plausible lower bound given negative selection into enrollment on math skills and major preferences). Overall, 3.2 percentage points—or 44% of the difference between enrollees and non-enrollees—is explained by college exposure to female instructors and students, consistent with a wider role for women’s colleges in increasing female participation in Economics.
31144.zh_abstract: 许多观察者认为，经济学和STEM领域的多样性至关重要，这不仅是因为平等主义目标，还因为一个领域内的人员构成可能塑造该领域的研究内容。如果提高女性选择数学密集型专业的比例是一个有价值的目标，那么理解女子学院是否因果性地影响这一选择就很重要。在韦尔斯利学院所有被录取的申请者中，入学学生获得经济学学位的可能性比未入学学生高出7.2个百分点（94%）（考虑到入学学生在数学技能和专业偏好上的负向选择，这可能是合理的下限）。总体而言，3.2个百分点——即入学学生与未入学学生之间差异的44%——可由大学期间接触女性教师和女性学生来解释，这与女子学院在提高女性参与经济学方面发挥更广泛作用的观点一致。

31143.title: Global Risk, Non-Bank Financial Intermediation, and Emerging Market Vulnerabilities
31143.zh_title: 全球风险、非银行金融中介与新兴市场脆弱性
31143.abstract: Over the last two decades, the unprecedented increase in non-bank financial intermediation, particularly open-end mutual funds and ETFs, accounts for nearly half of the external financing flows to emerging markets exceeding cross-border lending by global banks. Evidence suggests that investment fund flows enhance risk-sharing across borders and provide emerging markets access to more diverse forms of financing. However, a growing body of evidence also indicates that investment funds are inherently more vulnerable to liquidity and redemption risks during periods of global financial market stress, increasing the volatility of capital flows to emerging markets. Benchmark-driven investments, namely passive funds, appear particularly sensitive to global risk shocks such as tightening US dollar funding conditions relative to their active fund counterparts. The procyclicality of investment fund flows to emerging markets during times of global stress poses financial stability concerns with implications for the role of macroprudential policy.
31143.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，非银行金融中介（尤其是开放式共同基金和ETF）的空前增长，占到了流向新兴市场的外部融资流量的近一半，超过了全球银行的跨境贷款。证据表明，投资基金流动增强了跨境风险分担，并为新兴市场提供了更多样化的融资渠道。然而，越来越多的证据也表明，在全球金融市场压力时期，投资基金本质上更容易受到流动性和赎回风险的影响，从而增加了流向新兴市场的资本流动的波动性。基准驱动的投资（即被动型基金）相对于主动型基金，似乎对全球风险冲击（如美元融资条件收紧）特别敏感。在全球压力时期，投资基金流向新兴市场的顺周期性带来了金融稳定担忧，并对宏观审慎政策的作用产生了影响。
31143.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：F21, F32, F36, F65, G11, G15, G23

31142.title: Investigating the Complexity of Naloxone Distribution: Which Policies Matter for Pharmacies and Potential Recipients
31142.zh_title: 探究纳洛酮分发的复杂性：哪些政策对药房和潜在受药者重要
31142.authors: Rosanna Smart, David Powell, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula, Evan D. Peet, Rahi Abouk, Corey S. Davis
31142.abstract: Despite efforts to address the opioid crisis, opioid-related overdoses remain a significant contributor to mortality. State efforts to reduce overdose deaths by removing barriers to naloxone have recently focused on pharmacy channels, but the specifics of these laws and the contexts in which they are implemented vary widely. In this paper, we use novel methods robust to heterogeneous effects across states and time-varying policy effects to estimate the effects on naloxone pharmacy distribution of two types of laws: laws authorizing non-patient-specific prescription distribution of naloxone and laws granting pharmacists prescriptive authority for naloxone. We find that both types of laws significantly increase the volume of naloxone dispensed through pharmacies. However, relative to laws authorizing non-patient-specific prescription distribution, effects are significantly larger for pharmacist prescriptive authority laws. These larger effects only partially derive from increased naloxone prescribing by pharmacists. We also estimate large, significant increases in pharmacy dispensation of naloxone prescribed by non-pharmacist prescribers, with particularly large increases among family medicine physicians, with particularly large increases among family medicine physicians. The relative benefits of pharmacist prescriptive authority laws versus non-patient-specific distribution are larger among Non-Hispanic Black individuals, suggesting an important role of these policies for reducing disparities in access to naloxone.
31142.zh_abstract: 尽管努力应对阿片类药物危机，但与阿片类药物相关的过量用药仍然是导致死亡的重要原因。各州通过消除纳洛酮获取障碍来减少过量用药死亡的努力，近期主要集中在药房渠道，但这些法律的具体细节及其实施背景差异很大。在本文中，我们使用对跨州异质效应和政策时变效应具有稳健性的新方法，来估计两类法律对药房纳洛酮分发的影响：授权非特定患者处方分发纳洛酮的法律，以及授予药剂师纳洛酮处方权的法律。我们发现，这两类法律都显著增加了通过药房分发的纳洛酮数量。然而，与授权非特定患者处方分发的法律相比，药剂师处方权法律的效果显著更大。这些更大的效果仅部分源于药剂师开具纳洛酮处方的增加。我们还估计到，由非药剂师处方者开具的纳洛酮在药房的分发量出现了大幅且显著的增加，其中家庭医学医生的增长尤为突出。与非特定患者分发相比，药剂师处方权法律的相对益处对于非西班牙裔黑人个体更大，这表明这些政策在减少纳洛酮获取差距方面发挥着重要作用。

31141.title: Partial Outsourcing of Public Programs: Evidence on Determinants of Choice in Medicare
31141.zh_title: 公共项目的部分外包：医疗保险选择决定因素的证据
31141.authors: Marika Cabral, Colleen Carey, Jinyeong Son
31141.abstract: Many public programs let individuals choose between publicly provided benefits and a subsidized private alternative. We investigate the determinants of health insurance choice in Medicare—a setting with vast geographic variation in the share of individuals selecting the public option versus private alternative. We analyze insurance decisions among individuals who move to quantify the relative importance of individual-specific factors (such as preferences or income) and place-specific factors (such as local health insurance options) on insurance decisions. We find roughly 40% of the geographic variation in the share selecting private coverage is due to place-based factors, while the remainder is explained by individuals. Our findings highlight the importance of individual factors in these decisions and may inform discussions about the use of policy to address geographic disparities.
31141.zh_abstract: 许多公共项目允许个人在公共提供的福利和补贴的私人替代方案之间进行选择。我们研究了医疗保险中健康保险选择的决定因素——这是一个在个人选择公共选项与私人替代方案的比例上存在巨大地理差异的环境。我们分析了搬家个体的保险决策，以量化个体特定因素（如偏好或收入）和地方特定因素（如当地健康保险选项）对保险决策的相对重要性。我们发现，选择私人保险比例的地理差异中，大约40%是由地方因素造成的，而其余部分则由个体因素解释。我们的发现强调了在这些决策中个体因素的重要性，并可能为关于使用政策解决地理差异的讨论提供信息。

31140.title: The Optimal Taxation of Couples
31140.abstract: We consider optimal joint nonlinear earnings taxation of couples. We use multi-dimensional mechanism design techniques to study this problem and show that the first-order approach – that restricts attention to only local incentive constraints – is valid for a broad set of primitives. Optimal taxes are characterized by the solution to a certain second-order partial differential equation. Using the Coarea Formula, we solve this equation for various conditional averages of optimal tax rates and identify key forces that determine the optimal tax rates; show how these rates depend on earnings of each spouse, correlation in spousal earnings, and redistributive objectives of the planner; compare optimal rates for primary and secondary earners; identify both the conditions under which simple tax systems are optimal and the sources of welfare gains from more sophisticated taxes when those conditions are not satisfied. Under realistic assumptions, optimal tax rates for married individuals are increasing in correlation of spousal earnings. However, they remain lower than the tax rates for single individuals, and the marginal rates for one spouse increase (decrease) in the earnings of the other if both spouses have low (high) earnings.
31140.zh_abstract: 我们考虑夫妻联合非线性劳动收入的最优税收问题。我们使用多维机制设计技术来研究这一问题，并表明一阶方法——即只关注局部激励约束——对于广泛的基础设定是有效的。最优税收由某个二阶偏微分方程的解来刻画。利用余面积公式，我们求解了最优税率各种条件平均值的该方程，并识别了决定最优税率的关键力量；展示了这些税率如何取决于配偶各自的收入、配偶收入的相关性以及计划者的再分配目标；比较了主要收入者和次要收入者的最优税率；识别了简单税制最优的条件，以及当这些条件不满足时更复杂税制带来福利收益的来源。在现实假设下，已婚个体的最优税率随配偶收入相关性的增加而增加。然而，它们仍然低于单身个体的税率，并且如果配偶双方收入都低（高），则一方的边际税率随另一方收入的增加而增加（减少）。

31139.title: Projected Health Benefits and Health Care Savings from the United States National Hepatitis C Elimination Initiative
31139.zh_title: 美国国家丙型肝炎消除计划的预期健康收益和医疗保健节省
31139.authors: Jagpreet Chhatwal, Alec Aaron, Huaiyang Zhong, Neeraj Sood, Risha Irvin, Harvey J. Alter, Yueran Zhuo, Joshua M. Sharfstein, John W. Ward
31139.abstract: The national hepatitis C elimination initiative provides an opportunity to dramatically expand access to hepatitis C virus (HCV) treatment and put the US on a path to eliminating hepatitis C. Our objective was to project the health benefits and cost savings of this initiative. A previously developed mathematical model was updated to simulate trends in HCV disease burden and cost of care in the US for the next 20 years under status quo and national hepatitis C elimination initiative. Within five years, the initiative will diagnose 92.5% of all persons with HCV and cure 89.6% of HCV infection. Over 10 years, compared with the status quo, the initiative will avert 20,000 cases of hepatocellular carcinoma, 49,100 cases of diabetes, and 25,000 cases of chronic kidney disease. The initiative will also avert 24,000 deaths adding 220,000 life years. These benefits in improved health will save $\$18.1$ billion in direct healthcare spending, of which $\$13.3$ billion would accrue to the federal government. Over 20 years, the health benefits would increase by more than 2-fold and cost savings by 3-fold. The cost savings would further increase if the HCV incidence rate decreases because of rapid decline in HCV prevalence. In conclusion, the national hepatitis C elimination initiative would substantially reduce HCV-related morbidity and mortality and would reduce healthcare spending at 10 years and beyond.
31139.zh_abstract: 国家丙型肝炎消除计划提供了一个机会，可以大幅扩大丙型肝炎病毒（HCV）治疗的覆盖面，并使美国走上消除丙型肝炎的道路。我们的目标是预测该计划的健康收益和成本节省。我们更新了一个先前开发的数学模型，以模拟未来20年在美国现状和全国丙型肝炎消除计划下HCV疾病负担和护理成本的趋势。在五年内，该计划将诊断92.5%的HCV感染者，并治愈89.6%的HCV感染。在十年内，与现状相比，该计划将避免20,000例肝细胞癌、49,100例糖尿病和25,000例慢性肾脏病。该计划还将避免24,000例死亡，增加220,000生命年。这些健康改善带来的收益将节省181亿美元的直接医疗支出，其中133亿美元将由联邦政府承担。在二十年内，健康收益将增加两倍以上，成本节省将增加三倍。如果由于HCV患病率迅速下降而导致HCV发病率降低，成本节省将进一步增加。总之，国家丙型肝炎消除计划将大幅降低HCV相关的发病率和死亡率，并在十年及以后减少医疗支出。

31138.title: Deposit Franchise Runs
31138.authors: Itamar Drechsler, Alexi Savov, Philipp Schnabl, Olivier Wang
31138.abstract: We model a new type of bank run, a deposit franchise run. Banks pay below-market rates on deposits, which makes the deposit franchise a valuable asset. For a bank to keep this value, deposits must stay in the bank; if they leave, their value is lost to the bank. This makes the deposit franchise a runnable asset. Unlike Diamond-Dybvig runs, deposit franchise runs can occur even if the bank’s loans are fully liquid. Since the deposit franchise value increases with interest rates, a run is more harmful, and hence more likely, when rates are high. To avoid runs, banks can shorten the duration of their assets, but this can make them insolvent if interest rates fall. Avoiding both runs and insolvency requires additional capital in proportion to the value of the uninsured portion of the deposit franchise. We use our model to estimate deposit franchise values and show how to identify vulnerable banks in the context of the 2023 Regional Bank Crisis.
31138.zh_abstract: 我们建模了一种新型银行挤兑，即存款特许权挤兑。银行以低于市场的利率支付存款利息，这使得存款特许权成为一项有价值的资产。为了银行保持这一价值，存款必须留在银行；如果它们离开，其价值对银行而言就损失了。这使得存款特许权成为一种可挤兑的资产。与Diamond-Dybvig挤兑不同，即使银行的贷款完全具有流动性，存款特许权挤兑也可能发生。由于存款特许权价值随利率上升而增加，当利率高时，挤兑更具破坏性，因此也更可能发生。为了避免挤兑，银行可以缩短其资产的久期，但这可能使它们在利率下降时资不抵债。要同时避免挤兑和资不抵债，需要额外的资本，其数额与存款特许权未保险部分的价值成比例。我们使用我们的模型来估计存款特许权价值，并展示如何在2023年区域银行危机的背景下识别脆弱银行。

31137.title: Biodiversity Risk
31137.authors: Stefano Giglio, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Xuran Zeng
31137.abstract: We explore the effects of physical and regulatory risks related to biodiversity loss on economic activity and asset values. We first develop a news-based measure of aggregate biodiversity risk and analyze how it varies over time. We also construct and publicly release several firm-level measures of exposure to biodiversity risk, based on textual analyses of firms’ 10-K statements, a large survey of financial professionals, regulators, and academics, and the holdings of biodiversity-related funds. Exposures to biodiversity risk vary substantially across industries in a way that is economically sensible and distinct from exposures to climate risk. We find evidence that biodiversity risks already affect equity prices: returns of portfolios that are sorted on our measures of biodiversity risk exposure covary positively with innovations in aggregate biodiversity risk. However, our survey indicates that market participants do not perceive the current pricing of biodiversity risks to be adequate.
31137.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了与生物多样性丧失相关的物理风险和监管风险对经济活动及资产价值的影响。我们首先基于新闻构建了一个衡量总体生物多样性风险的指标，并分析其随时间的变化。我们还基于对企业10-K报表的文本分析、对金融专业人士、监管者和学者的大规模调查，以及生物多样性相关基金的持仓情况，构建并公开发布了多个企业层面的生物多样性风险暴露度量指标。不同行业的生物多样性风险暴露程度差异显著，这种差异在经济上具有合理性，并且与气候风险暴露截然不同。我们发现有证据表明，生物多样性风险已经影响股票价格：根据我们的生物多样性风险暴露度量指标排序的投资组合的回报，与总体生物多样性风险的创新呈正相关。然而，我们的调查表明，市场参与者认为当前生物多样性风险的定价并不充分。
31137.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：G10, G11, G12, Q5, Q53, Q57

31136.title: Beyond Racial Attitudes: The Role of Outside Options in the Dynamics of White Flight
31136.zh_title: 超越种族态度：外部选择在白人逃离动态中的作用
31136.abstract: When the fraction of minorities in a neighborhood exceeds the tipping point white flight accelerates. I develop a revealed-preference method to estimate the tipping points of 38,000 census tracts and the preferences of households for minority neighbors in the 123 Metropolitan Statistical Areas (MSA) covered by these census tracts over 40 years (1970-2010). I find that the average tipping point in an MSA initially covaries more with the racial attitudes of households than the outside options that they face but that this relationship reverses overtime. Ignoring outside options would obscure the declining role that racial attitudes play in understanding segregation.
31136.zh_abstract: 当一个社区中少数族裔的比例超过临界点时，白人逃离会加速。我开发了一种显示性偏好方法，用于估计1970年至2010年40年间，123个大都市统计区（MSA）内38,000个普查区的临界点，以及家庭对少数族裔邻居的偏好。我发现，最初，一个MSA的平均临界点与家庭的种族态度的协动性，比与它们所面临的外部选择的协动性更强，但这种关系随时间推移发生了逆转。忽略外部选择会掩盖种族态度在理解种族隔离中日益减弱的角色。

31135.title: Class Peers as Competitors and Educators: The Consequences of Rank-Based Rewards in US High Schools
31135.zh_title: 同班同学：既是竞争者也是教育者——美国高中基于排名的奖励制度的后果
31135.abstract: This paper examines the theoretical and empirical consequences of rank-based reward systems in schools in which students’ performance and effort are evaluated relative to their peers. In such environments, classmates act simultaneously as competitors—due to rank-determined rewards—and as educators through peer learning and assistance. Using nationally representative panel survey data from U.S. high schools, combined with administrative information on the location assignments of new refugee student cohorts, we exploit variation in school competition policies and class ability compositions to identify empirically their dual effects on student effort and peer learning. We develop a theoretical tournament model with heterogeneous students who adjust their effort in response to the effort of similar peers and in which students learn from peers. The model predicts that when rewards depend on relative standing, adding higher-ability students to a cohort will reduce both incumbent academic effort and peer assistance, particularly in schools emphasizing rank-based awards, while adding lower-ability students has the opposite effects. Empirical tests of the model confirm these predictions. In schools with strong rank-based reward policies, the addition of stronger peers reduces high-performing incumbent students’ homework time and eliminates the positive spillovers from peer learning observed in less competitive settings. The adverse effects are concentrated among high-ability incumbents, while lower-ability students—who are less likely to win competitive awards—are largely unaffected. The results indicate that performance-based competition undermines cooperative peer learning and reduces student effort and overall academic performance, especially in institutions with high-ability students that explicitly emphasize relative ranking in determining academic recognition.
31135.zh_abstract: 本文研究了学校中基于排名的奖励制度的理论和实证后果，在这种制度下，学生的表现和努力是根据其同龄人进行评价的。在这种环境中，同学同时扮演着竞争者的角色（由于排名决定的奖励）和教育者的角色（通过同伴学习和帮助）。利用美国高中的全国代表性面板调查数据，结合新难民学生群体所在地分配的行政信息，我们利用学校竞争政策和班级能力构成的差异，实证识别了它们对学生努力和同伴学习的双重影响。我们开发了一个理论锦标赛模型，其中包含异质性学生，他们会根据相似同伴的努力调整自己的努力，并且学生之间会相互学习。该模型预测，当奖励取决于相对排名时，向一个群体中加入能力更高的学生会减少现有学生的学业努力和同伴帮助，尤其是在强调基于排名奖励的学校中；而加入能力较低的学生则会产生相反的效果。对该模型的实证检验证实了这些预测。在实行严格基于排名奖励政策的学校中，加入更强的同伴会减少高表现现有学生的家庭作业时间，并消除在竞争较弱环境中观察到的同伴学习的正向溢出效应。这种不利影响主要集中在高能力的现有学生身上，而能力较低的学生——他们不太可能赢得竞争性奖励——则基本不受影响。结果表明，基于表现的竞争破坏了合作性的同伴学习，降低了学生的努力和整体学业表现，尤其是在那些明确强调相对排名以决定学业认可的高能力学生机构中。

31134.title: Supply Chain Risk: Changes in Supplier Composition and Vertical Integration
31134.zh_title: 供应链风险：供应商构成与纵向整合的变化
31134.authors: Nuri Ersahin, Mariassunta Giannetti, Ruidi Huang
31134.abstract: Using textual analysis of earnings conference calls, we quantify firms’ supply chain risk and its sources. Our proxy for supply chain risk exhibits large cross-sectional and time-series variation that aligns with reasonable priors and is unprecedently high during the Covid-19 pandemic. In addition, a firm exhibits high supply chain risk when its suppliers also do so. We find that firms that experience an increase in supply chain risk establish relationships with closer and domestic suppliers and with suppliers that are industry leaders, but also continue to work with suppliers in other continents. In addition, firms that do not face financial constraints become more likely to engage in vertical mergers and acquisitions.
31134.zh_abstract: 通过对财报电话会议的文本分析，我们量化了企业的供应链风险及其来源。我们的供应链风险代理指标表现出较大的横截面和时间序列变化，这与合理的先验预期一致，并在新冠疫情期间达到了前所未有的高度。此外，当一家企业的供应商也表现出高供应链风险时，该企业自身也呈现出高风险。我们发现，经历供应链风险增加的企业会与距离更近的、国内的供应商以及行业领先的供应商建立关系，但同时也会继续与其他大洲的供应商合作。此外，没有面临财务约束的企业更有可能进行纵向并购。

31133.title: Consumption Segregation
31133.abstract: This paper introduces consumption segregation as a new dimension of residential segregation, examines its patterns and determinants, and discusses its implications. Using novel longitudinal and highly granular data, we measure consumption segregation in the United States and document that, while it remains high, it has declined over the past 15 years and exhibits substantial regional variation. We find a strong correlation between consumption segregation and income segregation. We interpret it through the lens of a standard consumption model and argue that the correlation arises primarily due to incomplete markets that limit consumption insurance across income groups.
31133.zh_abstract: 本文引入了消费隔离作为居住隔离的一个新维度，考察了其模式与决定因素，并讨论了其含义。利用新颖的纵向和高粒度数据，我们衡量了美国的消费隔离，并记录到，尽管消费隔离仍然很高，但在过去15年中有所下降，并且表现出显著的区域差异。我们发现消费隔离与收入隔离之间存在强相关性。我们通过一个标准消费模型的视角对此进行解释，并认为这种相关性主要源于不完全市场限制了不同收入群体之间的消费保险。

31132.title: Understanding the Impacts of a Natural Disaster: Evidence from the 2004 Indian Ocean Tsunami
31132.zh_title: 理解自然灾害的影响：来自2004年印度洋海啸的证据
31132.authors: Elizabeth Frankenberg, Cecep Sumantri, Duncan Thomas
31132.abstract: Measuring impacts of extreme events on population well-being is complicated if data are not representative of the pre-event at-risk population or a representative sample of the population is not followed post-event. The sources and nature of some important biases are documented using data from the Study of the Tsunami Aftermath and Recovery (STAR) which documents the evolution of population well-being before and after a major natural disaster, the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami. The baseline, collected 10 months before the tsunami, is representative of the at-risk population. Respondents have been followed and re-interviewed multiple times in the fifteen years since the tsunami achieving high follow-up rates. We empirically document the importance of construct samples that represent the pre-event at-risk population, rather than an opportunistic sample of those in the vicinity of the event. Pre-event characteristics condition where and in what circumstances people live post-event. Post-event well-being is associated with post-event living conditions in the short-term, and that over time, the link weakens between short-term living arrangements and post-event well-being. Failure to follow-up all respondents, especially those who move away from the location of the event, yields biased estimates of impacts of the event.
31132.zh_abstract: 如果数据不能代表事件发生前面临风险的群体，或者事件发生后没有对人口的代表性样本进行追踪，那么衡量极端事件对人口福祉的影响就会变得复杂。我们利用海啸后果与恢复研究（STAR）的数据，记录了某些重要偏差的来源和性质。该研究记录了2004年印度洋海啸这一重大自然灾害前后人口福祉的演变。基线调查在海啸发生前10个月进行，代表了面临风险的群体。受访者在海啸发生后的十五年内被多次追踪和重新访谈，实现了高随访率。我们实证记录了构建代表事件前面临风险群体样本（而非事件附近的机会样本）的重要性。事件前的特征决定了事件后人们居住的地点和生活状况。事件后的福祉在短期内与事件后的生活条件相关，并且随着时间的推移，短期生活安排与事件后福祉之间的联系会减弱。未能对所有受访者（尤其是那些搬离事件发生地的人）进行随访，会导致对事件影响的估计产生偏差。

31131.title: What Can Historically Black Colleges and Universities Teach about Improving Higher Education Outcomes for Black Students?
31131.zh_title: 传统黑人学院和大学能教给我们什么，以改善黑人学生的高等教育成果？
31131.abstract: Historically Black colleges and universities are institutions that were established prior to 1964 with the principal mission of educating Black Americans. In this essay, we focus on two main issues. We start by examining how Black College students perform across HBCUs and non-HBCUs by looking at a relatively broad range of outcomes, including college and graduate school completion, job satisfaction, social mobility, civic engagement, and health. HBCUs punch significantly above their weight, especially considering their significant lack of resources. We then turn to the potential causes of these differences and provide a glimpse into the “secret sauce” of HBCUs. We conclude with potential implications for HBCU and non-HBCU policy.
31131.zh_abstract: 传统黑人学院和大学是指在1964年之前建立、主要使命是教育美国黑人的机构。在这篇文章中，我们关注两个主要问题。我们首先通过考察相对广泛的结果，包括大学和研究生院毕业率、工作满意度、社会流动性、公民参与和健康状况，来审视黑人学生在HBCU和非HBCU中的表现。HBCU的表现显著超出其应有水平，尤其是考虑到它们严重缺乏资源。然后，我们转向这些差异的潜在原因，并一窥HBCU的“秘诀”。最后，我们总结了HBCU和非HBCU政策的潜在启示。
31131.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS；JEL：I21, J01, J15, Z13

31130.title: Local and National Concentration Trends in Jobs and Sales: The Role of Structural Transformation
31130.zh_title: 就业与销售额的本地和全国集中度趋势：结构转型的作用
31130.authors: David Autor, Christina Patterson, John Van Reenen
31130.abstract: National industrial concentration in the U.S. has risen sharply since the early 1980s, but there remains dispute over whether local geographic concentration has followed a similar trend. Using near population data from the Economic Censuses, we confirm and extend existing evidence on national U.S. industrial concentration while providing novel evidence on local concentration. We document that the Herfindhahl index of local employment concentration, measured at the county-by-NAICS six-digit-industry cell level, fell between 1992 and 2017 even as local sales concentration rose. The divergence between national and local employment concentration trends is attributable to the structural transformation of U.S. economic activity: both sales and employment concentration rose within industry-by-county cells; but reallocation of sales and employment from relatively concentrated Manufacturing industries (e.g., steel mills) towards relatively un-concentrated Service industries (e.g. hair salons) reduced local concentration. A stronger between-sector shift in employment relative to sales drove the net fall in local employment concentration. Holding industry employment shares at their 1992 level, average local employment concentration would have risen by about 9% by 2017. Instead, it fell by 5%. Falling local employment concentration may intensify competition for recent market entrants. Simultaneously, rising within industry-by-geography concentration may weaken competition for incumbent workers who have limited sectoral mobility. To facilitate analysis, we have made data on these trends available for download.
31130.zh_abstract: 自20世纪80年代初以来，美国的全国工业集中度急剧上升，但对于本地地理集中度是否遵循了类似趋势仍存在争议。利用经济普查的近乎总体数据，我们确认并扩展了关于美国全国工业集中度的现有证据，同时提供了关于本地集中度的新证据。我们记录到，本地就业集中度的赫芬达尔指数（按县和NAICS六位数行业单元衡量）在1992年至2017年间下降，而同期本地销售额集中度上升。全国和本地就业集中度趋势之间的差异可归因于美国经济活动的结构转型：在行业-县单元内部，销售额和就业集中度均有所上升；但销售额和就业从相对集中的制造业（例如，钢厂）向相对不集中的服务业（例如，理发店）的重新分配降低了本地集中度。就业方面比销售额方面更强的跨部门转移，推动了本地就业集中度的净下降。如果将行业就业份额保持在1992年的水平，到2017年，平均本地就业集中度本应上升约9%。但实际上，它下降了5%。本地就业集中度的下降可能会加剧新市场进入者之间的竞争。同时，行业-地理单元内部集中度的上升可能会削弱那些行业流动性有限的在职工人的竞争。为便于分析，我们已将这些趋势的数据提供下载。
31130.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS；JEL：E23, J42, L10, L11, L22, R11, R12

31129.title: Disinflation and the Stock Market: Third World Lessons for First World Monetary Policy
31129.zh_title: 去通胀与股票市场：第三世界对第一世界货币政策的启示
31129.abstract: When policymakers implement a disinflation program directed at high inflation, the real dollar value of their country’s stock market index experiences a cumulative abnormal 12-month return of 48 percent in anticipation of the event. In contrast, the average cumulative abnormal 12-month return associated with disinflations directed at moderate inflation is negative 18 percent. The 66-percentage point difference between cumulative abnormal returns, along with descriptive evidence and case studies, suggests that unlike the swift eradication of past high inflations documented by Sargent (1982), the US will not experience a quick, low-cost transition from moderate inflation to the Fed’s two-percent target.
31129.zh_abstract: 当政策制定者实施针对高通胀的去通胀计划时，其国家股票市场指数的实际美元价值在事件预期期间会经历累计异常12个月回报率48%。相比之下，针对温和通胀的去通胀计划相关的平均累计异常12个月回报率为负18%。累计异常回报率之间66个百分点的差异，连同描述性证据和案例研究，表明与Sargent（1982）所记载的过去高通胀迅速消除不同，美国不会经历从温和通胀到美联储2%目标的快速、低成本过渡。

31128.title: FDI and Superstar Spillovers: Evidence from Firm-to-Firm Transactions
31128.zh_title: 外商直接投资与超级明星溢出效应：来自企业间交易的证据
31128.authors: Mary Amiti, Cédric Duprez, Jozef Konings, John Van Reenen
31128.abstract: Using firm-to-firm transactions, we show that starting to supply a ‘superstar’ firm (large domestic firms, exporters and multinationals) boosts productivity by 8% in the medium-run. Placebos on starting relationships with smaller firms and novel identification strategies support a causal interpretation of “superstar spillovers”. Consistent with a model of technology transfer, we find falls in markups and bigger treatment effects from technology-intensive superstars. We also show that the increase in new buyers is particularly strong within the superstar firm's network, a “dating agency” effect. This suggests an important role for raising productivity through superstars' supply chains regardless of their multinational status.
31128.zh_abstract: 利用企业间交易数据，我们表明开始向“超级明星”企业（大型国内企业、出口商和跨国公司）供货会在中期内使生产率提高8%。关于与较小企业建立关系的安慰剂检验以及新颖的识别策略支持了“超级明星溢出效应”的因果解释。与技术转移模型一致，我们发现加成率下降，且来自技术密集型超级明星的处理效应更大。我们还表明，新买家数量的增加在超级明星企业的网络内尤为显著，这是一种“婚介所”效应。这表明，无论其跨国状态如何，通过超级明星企业的供应链提高生产率都发挥着重要作用。

31127.title: Day Traders, Noise, and Cost of Immediacy
31127.zh_title: 日内交易者、噪音与即时性成本
31127.authors: Manoj Dalvi, Prachi Deuskar, Lawrence R. Glosten, Ravi Jagannathan
31127.abstract: We identify different roles traders play using data with trader identities for all transactions in SENSEX-index stocks on the Bombay Stock Exchange from January 2005 to December 2011. Individual day traders (IDT) are identified as “noise traders”, who play an important role in the market microstructure literature. We measure the impact of their activity on market liquidity and trading of other market participants. IDT contribute 10% to volume while losing 3.2 bp (73% of the half-spread) on average on trades with others, including proprietary day traders (PDT), the primary intraday-liquidity providers, and longer-term traders.
